creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Fri, Mar 09, 2001 at 12:11:24PM -0500, khera@kciLink.com wrote:
> >How-To-Repeat:
> [root@onceler]# make package
> ===>  Building package for OpenSSH-askpass-1.2.2.2001.02.24
> Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/OpenSSH-askpass-1.2.2.2001.02.24.tgz
> Registering depends:.
> Creating gzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/OpenSSH-askpass-1.2.2.2001.02.24.tgz'
> tar: can't add file lib/X11/doc/html/ssh-askpass.1.html : No such file or directory
>  60.3%
> pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/security/openssh-askpass.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/security/openssh-askpass.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/security/openssh-askpass.

Hmm.  I added this file.  I thought it worked for me, since ``make package''
worked, and bento reported this file missing from pkg-plist.  Strange.
Sorry I broke your package, Kris.

-- 
wca
